title: Straw Hat Structures: East Blue
description: Adding islands from One Piece into Minecraft. Currently in very alpha stages.
body:
### **Straw Hat Structures: East Blue** is currently in alpha stages and aims to add the iconic islands from the _One Piece_ East Blue saga into Minecraft.

The first island island featured in this mod is Foosha Village (Windmill Village). Foosha village's design was designed after the anime, and features the iconic "Partys Bar".

This mod was created for the [Into the Grand Line](https://modrinth.com/modpack/into-the-grand-line) modpack, and we plan to slowly integrate various [Mine Piece](https://modrinth.com/mod/orca-mine-piece) features/enemies into it.![Front of Partys Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d1d77f770f8bbe2c6dbc1464fbb48c6e6d67702.jpeg)
## Current Islands:
- Foosha Island
## Planned Islands:
- Shells Town
- Orange Town
- Syrup Village
